URL: https://codesport.studio/blogs/sports-tech-industry-challenges

SUMMARY:
Integration: One of the biggest challenges facing the sports technology industry is integrating new technologies with existing infrastructure, systems, and processes . Integrating new technologies can be costly and time-consuming, and it requires significant investment in research and development.

enriched_points.expanded_content: The integration of advanced sports technology requires substantial investment, often straining budgets, as seen in the challenges of aligning with existing systems.
Ensuring equitable access to new technologies remains a significant hurdle, particularly for underfunded programs, highlighting disparities in athlete resources and opportunities.
Continuous research is essential to adapt technologies effectively, addressing evolving needs and ensuring compliance with regulatory standards in the rapidly changing sports landscape.
